description: Pre-registered expectations for the changepoint screen. Break-year windows allow +/-1 around the manuscript dates; sizes come from the manuscript's Table 3 entries. Mismatches are findings.
notes: Screen runs on the RAW hindsight series (regime means are the screen's output, so shrinkage cannot precede it); u_03c verifies this choice against the shrunk alternative for the headline breaks. Pre-registered prediction, from pixel-reading Figure 1: the raw profile for Fenway peaks at 1934 (the Yawkey reconstruction year) while the shrunk profile peaks at 1935, explaining the original one-year miss. 1934-and-stays-1935 on the raw series would falsify that prediction and the paper keeps its 'missed by a year' sentence. min_seasons=10 is the long-tenure threshold; if the resulting park count is far from the paper's 65, that is a finding about the original threshold, not a knob to tune silently.
